business.yearsInBusiness: Established coin and gold buyer in Baltimore

content.about: Baltimore Gold & Coin offers competitive prices for gold items, rare coins, bullion, numismatic coins, and stamp collections. They provide professional appraisal services for antique and collectible items in the Baltimore area.

The Antique Man has been a Baltimore fixture on Fleet Street for 40 years, specializing in sports cards and memorabilia, vintage collectibles, and antique furniture. Their decades of experience make them a trusted resource for antique appraisals in Baltimore.

Antique Exchange Inc has been a Baltimore destination for 29 years, offering antiques, silver, frames, gifts, and interior design services. They provide appraisal services and consignment options for estate items.

Imperial Half Bushel has been a premier Baltimore antique silver dealer for 26 years, specializing in American silver with a particular focus on Baltimore-made Stieff and Kirk silver. They offer expert silver appraisal and valuation services.

Harrison Appraisals serves clients throughout Maryland with qualified appraisals of antiques, fine art, jewelry, and estate contents. Professional valuations for insurance, estate, and donation purposes.
content.notes: Serving Baltimore, MD with professional antique appraisal services.
